plot_points: Dude, a stylish gangster, is obsessed with finding the mythical herb Neelakoduveli.
Shaji Pappan and his tug-of-war team win a goat named Pinky as the prize.
The gang plans a grand goat barbecue trip to the hills.
A chain of accidents, fights, and misunderstandings turn the trip into pure chaos.
All storylines collide as Dude and Shaji's gang cross paths over Neelakoduveli and Pinky.
running_gags: The gang's endless bad luck and injuries.
Over-the-top action for very small problems.

plot_points: Shaji Pappan returns, now stuck in new financial troubles.
A sandalwood-smuggling case and fake currency scam pull the gang into deeper mess.
Lassar, Sabu, and other villains chase money, revenge, and confusion.
Shaji's temper and ego make every situation worse.
It all builds into one more insane final chase and confrontation.
running_gags: Shaji's legendary back pain appearing at the worst moments.
The gang trying to act smart and always failing.
Random side characters creating unnecessary drama.
